    math/libxlsxwriter: Improve port and switch to CMake

    * Switch to CMake
    * Enable "make test"
    * Unbundle libs (md5 and minizip)
    * Import upstreamed PR #454

    Reference:
    https://github.com/jmcnamara/libxlsxwriter/pull/454

    PR:             281018
    Reviewed by:    bapt (maintainer)
